mapper.select: select mem_num,id,authority, nick_name, passwd, email from spmember join spmember_detail using (mem_num) where id = #{id}
mapper.update: update spmember_detail set name = #{name}, phone =#{phone}, email= #{email}, zipcode=#{zipcode}, address1=#{address1}, address2=#{address2}, modify_date=sysdate where mem_num=#{mem_num}

if.if: m.id like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' or m.nick_name like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' or d.name like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' or d.email like '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

mapper.select: select count(*) from spmember m left outer join spmember_detail d using (mem_num)

select * from spmember m left outer join spmember_detail d using (mem_num)
order by d.reg_date desc nulls last offset #{skip} rows fetch next #{limit} rows only
